zh.Bexhill, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可貝可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Batisford of Wartling於1331年出生在英國素可時，他的父親Arthur de Battisford20歲，母親Henrietta de Battisford11歲。他於1363年與Lady Margaret de Peplesham在英國素可瓦特林結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1404年1月18日在英國英格蘭素可貝可爾享年73歲。

zh-hans.Bexhill, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可貝可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Batisford of Wartling于1331年出生在英国素可时，他的父亲Arthur de Battisford20岁，母亲Henrietta de Battisford11岁。他于1363年与Lady Margaret de Peplesham在英国素可瓦特林结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1404年1月18日在英国英格兰素可貝可爾享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Batisford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Batsford (Gloucestershire) or Battisford (Suffolk). The Gloucestershire placename is derived from the Old English personal name Bæcci + genitive -es + ōra ‘slope, shoulder-shaped hill’ (altered in Early Modern English as if from the word ford). The first element of the Suffolk name is the unattested personal name Bætti in the genitive case + ford.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Batisford of Wartling was born in 1331, in Sussex, England, his father, Arthur de Battisford, was 20 and his mother, Henrietta de Battisford, was 11. He married Lady Margaret de Peplesham in 1363, in Wartling, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died on 18 January 1404, in Bexhill, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Batisford of Wartling est né en 1331, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Arthur de Battisford, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Henrietta de Battisford, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret de Peplesham en 1363, à Wartling, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé le 18 janvier 1404, à Bexhill, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Batisford of Wartling 1331 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arthur de Battisford 20 und seine Mutter Henrietta de Battisford 11. Er hat 1363 in Wartling, Sussex, England Lady Margaret de Peplesham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Januar 1404 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Bexhill, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Batisford of Wartling è nato il nel 1331 nel Sussex, England, il suo padre, Arthur de Battisford, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Henrietta de Battisford, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret de Peplesham nel 1363, nel Wartling, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 18 gennaio 1404, nel Bexhill, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Batisford of Wartlingが1331年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Arthur de Battisfordは20歳，母Henrietta de Battisfordは11歳であった。1363年にイギリススセックスワートリングでLady Margaret de Pepleshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1404年1月18日にイギリスイギリススセックスベクスヒルで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Batisford of Wartling(이)가 1331년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arthur de Battisford(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Henrietta de Battisford(은)는 11세였다. 그는 1363년 영국 수세스 워틀링에서 Lady Margaret de Peplesham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 1월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 브스힐에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Bexhill, Sussex, England: Bexhill, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Batisford of Wartling nasceu em 1331, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Arthur de Battisford, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Henrietta de Battisford, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret de Peplesham em 1363, em Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1404, em Bexhill, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Batisford of Wartling родился в 1331 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Arthur de Battisford было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Henrietta de Battisford, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret de Peplesham в 1363 г. в местности вартлинг, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 18 января 1404 г. в местности бексхилл, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Batisford of Wartling nació en 1331, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Arthur de Battisford, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Henrietta de Battisford, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret de Peplesham en 1363, en Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de enero de 1404, en Bexhill, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
